name: JobRequisition
description: A job requisition represents a hiring need for a specific position within an organization, including the job profile, number of openings, compensation range, and recruiting status.

id.description: Workday ID (WID) uniquely identifying the job requisition

status.description: Current status of the job requisition

jobProfile.description: A reference to a related Workday resource

id.description: Workday ID (WID) of the referenced resource

descriptor.description: Display name of the referenced resource

jobDescription.example: Strong technical background with 8+ years of experience in distributed systems.

qualifications.example: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience; 5+ years of professional software development.

createdOn.description: Timestamp when the requisition was created

updatedOn.description: Timestamp when the requisition was last updated
